## reference · Postel's Law

* Be liberal in accepting user input, and conservative in sending output.
* Anticipate and plan for virtually any user action or input to provide a reliable interface.
* Accept variable input from users, translating it to meet requirements, and provide clear feedback.
* Define boundaries for input to ensure robustness.

Sources: https://lawsofux.com/postels-law/
